metadata.title: Currento
metadata.description: Track your income and expenses with clarity.

settings_page.subtitle: Choose how Currento should look and which language it should use.

spaces_page.title: Spaces
spaces_page.create_space_hint: Create a dedicated space to organize your transactions.
spaces_page.edit_space_hint: Update the space name while keeping its history and transactions intact.

spaces_page.detail_hero_subtitle: Track how %{month} is shaping this space and jump into related transactions.
spaces_page.payment_due_day_hint: Choose the due day and whether this card settles the same month or the month before. Shorter months use the last day of the month.
spaces_page.settle_unavailable: No amount to settle for this space.

spaces_page.archive_requires_confirm: Type delete exactly to archive the space.
